name: usb-cam-app
description: Android USB Camera App – 100% lokal, kein Cloud, kein Tracking. UVC + EasyCap + Capture Cards via USB-C OTG.

scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.apk:debug: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.apk:release: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
